_meta.description: Impact-function presets the Vulnerability studio applies with one click. TC sets tc_v_half (Emanuel form, v_thresh=25.7 m/s, Eberenz 2021 regional); flood sets flood_mdr (Huizinga/JRC); earthquake sets eq_mdr (indicative construction-class MMI curves — CLIMADA ships no earthquake impf).
_meta.generator: scripts/build_impf_presets.py (run in the CLIMADA worker env)
